top_tweets.text:
Jony Ive: Using touchscreens for basic car controls is a 'dumb design' that endangers lives.

"People are dying because of dumb design." 

"Multi-touch shouldn't be in a car. It requires by definition that you're looking at a display."

When the man who popularized the https://t.co/aJkWEhxPmG
top_tweets.author: tonjkb
top_tweets.name: Tony Jacob | FindaClip.com
top_tweets.summary_zh: Jony Ive 批評汽車觸控螢幕是「愚蠢的設計」並危及生命，認為多點觸控需要駕駛分心看螢幕，不該用於基本車輛控制。諷刺的是這番話正出自觸控螢幕普及推手之口。

top_tweets.text:
We are so lucky that Valve is the developer behind Deadlock because they actually listen to the community.

Ivy 2.0 would’ve been an absolute nuclear bomb to the game’s visual design. It felt like it could have been the start of a downward spiral where the art style slowly loses https://t.co/I1SpNqyBsX
top_tweets.author: Sage_VALE_
top_tweets.name: Sage VALE (Mina Ha thrall)
top_tweets.summary_zh: Valve 聆聽社群意見調整 Deadlock 角色設計（Ivy 2.0），避免遊戲視覺風格走向失控的下坡路，展現開發者對設計一致性的重視。

top_tweets.text: A new design was made by a woman and even works better. She got funding for it, even got double the funding goal. Material science and ergonomics work are underway. Next steps will look into injection molding to make mass production possible, after which human trials will be
top_tweets.author: Timmysofine
top_tweets.name: Oluwatimileyin✨🦋
top_tweets.summary_zh: 一位女性設計師改良某產品設計，不僅募得雙倍目標資金，目前正進行材料科學與人體工學研究，下一步將評估射出成型以利量產及人體試驗。

top_tweets.text:
rivers of ink will be spilled about the Luce design

but my biggest gripe with it is that it's clearly made by people with no rage in their heart, and no sex in their veins  

ferrari is about love and anger in a way that wholesome california design bois will never understand https://t.co/qwizPgeIyl
top_tweets.author: yitong
top_tweets.name: yitong
top_tweets.summary_zh: 批評 Ferrari Luce 設計缺乏 Ferrari 品牌核心的「愛與憤怒」，認為是由沒有激情的加州設計師操刀，無法理解品牌精神。

top_tweets.text:
Akira Toriyama said that Cell was a nightmare for animators. He added the spots at the last minute because the design felt too plain.

Animators had to replicate the complex pattern consistently across hundreds of frames while adding realistic shadows and lighting on top https://t.co/98VtxPaa3D
top_tweets.author: AnimexTwts
top_tweets.name: Anime Tweets
top_tweets.summary_zh: 鳥山明透露 Cell 的斑點是設計最後階段才加上，導致動畫師需在數百幀中一致重現複雜圖案並處理光影，成為製作惡夢。這案例凸顯設計決策對下游執行成本的影響。

top_tweets.text:

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
